name: Workers comp denied my forklift back injury from work, now what?
description: Appeal in 20 days with lawyer; denials common but winnable.

mainEntity.name: Workers comp denied my forklift back injury from work, now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal in 20 days with lawyer; denials common but winnable.
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal within 20 days to Utah Labor Commission; gather more medical proof.[5] Context: Denials often for 'not work-related' but forklift incidents qualify. Key factors: Independent exam, supervisor statements. Practical guidance: Hire attorney experienced in appeals; 70% overturned with representation. Keep treating.
